imagesets.name: CC Sample B/W Images

imagesets.name: Biblica NT Images
imagesets.description: 501 black & white line-art illustrations covering the New Testament (Matthew through Revelation). Contributed and copyright controlled by Biblica.
imagesets.license_text:
The images in this imageset are contributed and copyright controlled by Biblica. They are made available under a Creative Commons 4.0 license: CC-BY-NC.

For full details of what a particular license means, please see https://creativecommons.org/about/cclicenses/

The NonCommercial restriction on images is defined by Creative Commons as "not primarily intended for or directed towards commercial advantage or monetary compensation". Thus, for example, publication primarily for commercial gain is not allowed, while charging for publications to cover costs or less is allowed. Notice that the inclusion of NC in the license means that the publication must also be licensed with a non commercial restriction.
